Package microui.util

Class SpatialState

java.lang.Object
microui.util.SpatialState
public final class SpatialState extends Object
SpatialState the class of states for SpatialAnimator
See Also:
  • SpatialView

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    SpatialState()
    Constructs a SpatialState with zero bounds.
    SpatialState(float x, float y, float width, float height)
    Constructs SpatialState with initialization
    SpatialState(SpatialView source)
    Constructs SpatialState with initialization of bounds from SpatialView object
    SpatialState(SpatialState source)
    Constructs SpatialState with initialization of bounds from other SpatialState object

    Sets a supplier for the X coordinate.

  • Constructor Details

    • SpatialState

      public SpatialState(float x, float y, float width, float height)
      Constructs SpatialState with initialization
      Parameters:
      x - the coordinate state
      y - the coordinate state
      width - the dimension state
      height - the dimension state

    • SpatialState

      public SpatialState(SpatialView source)
      Constructs SpatialState with initialization of bounds from SpatialView object
      Parameters:
      source - is current source for copy state

    • SpatialState

      public SpatialState(SpatialState source)
      Constructs SpatialState with initialization of bounds from other SpatialState object
      Parameters:
      source - is current source for copy state

    • SpatialState

      public SpatialState()
      Constructs a SpatialState with zero bounds.

  • Method Details

    • setSupplierX

      public void setSupplierX(Supplier<Float> supplierX)
      Sets a supplier for the X coordinate. When present, getX() will use this supplier.
      Parameters:
      supplierX - the supplier for X, cannot be null.
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if supplierX is null.

    • setSupplierY

      public void setSupplierY(Supplier<Float> supplierY)
      Sets a supplier for the Y coordinate. When present, getY() will use this supplier.
      Parameters:
      supplierY - the supplier for Y, cannot be null.
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if supplierY is null.

    • setSupplierWidth

      public void setSupplierWidth(Supplier<Float> supplierWidth)
      Sets a supplier for the width. When present, getWidth() will use this supplier.
      Parameters:
      supplierWidth - the supplier for width, cannot be null.
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if supplierWidth is null.

    • setSupplierHeight

      public void setSupplierHeight(Supplier<Float> supplierHeight)
      Sets a supplier for the height. When present, getHeight() will use this supplier.
      Parameters:
      supplierHeight - the supplier for height, cannot be null.
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if supplierHeight is null.

      public float getX()
      Returns variable x
      Returns:
      the current variable x

      Returns variable y
      Returns:

      Returns variable width
